description: Change Prettier trailingComma setting from 'none' to 'all' and reformat the entire codebase. This ensures trailing commas are added to all multi-line structures (function parameters, arguments, arrays, objects, imports, exports).
steps: Update .prettierrc to change trailingComma from 'none' to 'all'
Run pnpm format to reformat all files with the new trailing comma setting
Run pnpm format:check to verify all files are formatted correctly
Run pnpm lint to verify no new lint errors introduced
acceptance_criteria: All files in the codebase are formatted with trailing commas in multi-line structures
verification: Run pnpm prettier --check . and confirm exit code 0
Run pnpm nx run-many -t lint and confirm exit code 0
